description: Bandra -> Goregaon along the Western Express Highway (matches DATA.routes['A-71'] in js/data.js so live detections land on the replay corridor).
_note: duration_sec is a fallback. build_dashboard_data.py overrides it with the real clip duration (last_frame_index / fps) from the detector's summary so detections spread across the whole route regardless of clip length. Waypoints are [lat, lon]; drop in a real GPX/CSV later by replacing this file's waypoints.
